title: クレーンゲーム大成功！

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Wow! You got so many! You're a real claw
machine pro!
choice_data_list: Make sure you take good care of them.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
I will! I'll send you a picture after I'm done setting
them up in my room!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: ...Oh! I thought of a new proverb!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
"A plushie a day keeps the running fatigue at
bay!" I feel like I can work even harder than ever
with these plushies by my side!
